title: Jouyella philipporum
taxonomy: Jouyella philipporum is classified as a species of fungus in the family Hypocreaceae. It belongs to the genus Jouyella and is a part of the phylum Ascomycota. As a member of the Hypocreaceae family, Jouyella philipporum is closely related to other fungal species that are known for their role in decomposing organic matter. The classification of Jouyella philipporum is based on its unique morphological and molecular characteristics. Jouyella philipporum is a relatively newly discovered species, and further research is needed to fully understand its classification and relationships within the fungal kingdom.

intro: Jouyella philipporum, also known as Philippine plant, is a plant species that has been traditionally used in folk medicine.
